name: aie-board
description: Live room board for The AI-Native Engineer workshop — Cloudflare Worker + D1 + AI Gateway.

scripts.migrate:local: npx wrangler d1 migrations apply aie-board --local
scripts.migrate:remote: npx wrangler d1 migrations apply aie-board --remote
scripts.secrets: echo 'Run: wrangler secret put SUBMIT_TOKEN | ADMIN_TOKEN | ANTHROPIC_API_KEY (optional AI_GATEWAY_URL)'
scripts.build: mkdir -p public && cp board.html public/index.html && cp board.js public/board.js && cp admin.html public/admin.html && cp vendor/d3.min.js public/d3.min.js
